'''鈭歮-v-th''' ('''mavatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yelloch|yelloch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yelloch|yelloch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-v-th
|-
! Lemma
| mavatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mavathithi|mavathithi]] || [[word:mavathiji|mavathiji]] || [[word:mavathishi|mavathishi]] || [[word:mavathi|mavathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mavathuthuth|mavathuthuth]] || [[word:mavathujuj|mavathujuj]] || [[word:mavathushush|mavathushush]] || [[word:mavath|mavath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mavathuthu|mavathuthu]] || [[word:mavathuju|mavathuju]] || [[word:mavathushu|mavathushu]] || [[word:mavathu|mavathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mavathufuth|mavathufuth]] || [[word:mavathufuj|mavathufuj]] || [[word:mavathufush|mavathufush]] || [[word:mavathuf|mavathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mavathethe|mavathethe]] || [[word:mavatheje|mavatheje]] || [[word:mavatheshe|mavatheshe]] || [[word:mavathe|mavathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mavathothoth|mavathothoth]] || [[word:mavathojoj|mavathojoj]] || [[word:mavathoshosh|mavathoshosh]] || [[word:mavath|mavath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mavathotho|mavathotho]] || [[word:mavathojo|mavathojo]] || [[word:mavathosho|mavathosho]] || [[word:mavatho|mavatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mavathofoth|mavathofoth]] || [[word:mavathofoj|mavathofoj]] || [[word:mavathofosh|mavathofosh]] || [[word:mavathof|mavathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mavath忙th忙|mavath忙th忙]] || [[word:mavath忙j忙|mavath忙j忙]] || [[word:mavath忙sh忙|mavath忙sh忙]] || [[word:mavath忙|mavath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mavathathath|mavathathath]] || [[word:mavathajaj|mavathajaj]] || [[word:mavathashash|mavathashash]] || [[word:mavath|mavath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mavathatha|mavathatha]] || [[word:mavathaja|mavathaja]] || [[word:mavathasha|mavathasha]] || [[word:mavatha|mavatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mavathafath|mavathafath]] || [[word:mavathafaj|mavathafaj]] || [[word:mavathafash|mavathafash]] || [[word:mavathaf|mavathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mavathasha|mavathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomavathasha|gomavathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimavathasha|gokimavathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mavathn眉sha|mavathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomavathnkn眉sha|gomavathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimavathn眉sha|gokimavathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mavathsh毛sha|mavathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomavathnksh毛sha|gomavathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimavathsh毛sha|gokimavathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mavathrosha|mavathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomavathnkrosha|gomavathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimavathrosha|gokimavathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mavathmusha|mavathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomavathnkmusha|gomavathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimavathmusha|gokimavathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mavathsherasha|mavathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomavathnksherasha|gomavathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimavathsherasha|gokimavathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mavathngasha|mavathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomavathnkngasha|gomavathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimavathngasha|gokimavathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mavathyasha|mavathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomavathnkyasha|gomavathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimavathyasha|gokimavathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mavathyamasha|mavathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomavathnkyamasha|gomavathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimavathyamasha|gokimavathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mavathn眉sh毛sha|mavathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomavathnkn眉sh毛sha|gomavathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimavathn眉sh毛sha|gokimavathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mavathn眉rosha|mavathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomavathnkn眉rosha|gomavathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimavathn眉rosha|gokimavathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mavathn眉musha|mavathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomavathnkn眉musha|gomavathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimavathn眉musha|gokimavathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mavathsh毛n眉sha|mavathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomavathnksh毛n眉sha|gomavathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimavathsh毛n眉sha|gokimavathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mavathsh毛rosha|mavathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomavathnksh毛rosha|gomavathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimavathsh毛rosha|gokimavathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mavathsh毛musha|mavathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomavathnksh毛musha|gomavathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimavathsh毛musha|gokimavathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mavathron眉sha|mavathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomavathnkron眉sha|gomavathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimavathron眉sha|gokimavathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mavathrosh毛sha|mavathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomavathnkrosh毛sha|gomavathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimavathrosh毛sha|gokimavathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mavathromusha|mavathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomavathnkromusha|gomavathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimavathromusha|gokimavathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mavathmun眉sha|mavathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomavathnkmun眉sha|gomavathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimavathmun眉sha|gokimavathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mavathmush毛sha|mavathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomavathnkmush毛sha|gomavathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimavathmush毛sha|gokimavathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mavathmurosha|mavathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomavathnkmurosha|gomavathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimavathmurosha|gokimavathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mavath|mavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:m忙v忙th|m忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homavath|homavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hom忙v忙th|hom忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomavath|hohomavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohom忙v忙th|hohom忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉mavath|n眉mavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉m忙v忙th|n眉m忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉mavath|n眉n眉mavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉m忙v忙th|n眉n眉m忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂mavath|n茂mavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂m忙v忙th|n茂m忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂mavath|n茂n茂mavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂m忙v忙th|n茂n茂m忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumavath|lumavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lum忙v忙th|lum忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumavath|lulumavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulum忙v忙th|lulum忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limavath|limavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lim忙v忙th|lim忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimavath|lilimavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilim忙v忙th|lilim忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komavath|komavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kom忙v忙th|kom忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomavath|kokomavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokom忙v忙th|kokom忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemavath|kemavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kem忙v忙th|kem忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemavath|kekemavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekem忙v忙th|kekem忙v忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
